title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers · Pipeline Brief: Decorator Restraint
summary: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp decorator restraint increment in a transparent decorator stack with order tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reject decorators that hide material domain behavior or make dependencies untestable.
Test how stacked decorators change control flow, data, and failure handling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
